title: gutzlaffia lyi
intro: Gutzlaffia lyi, also known as the Gutian tree or Gutian shrub, is a plant species native to southern China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Santalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Gutzlaffia lyi is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Gutzlaffia lyi include teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
